creator: zlopi.ru@gmail.com
text:
[root@zlopi /usr/ports/devel/boost]# make -DWITH_PYTHON -DWITH_PYSTE

Python bindings enabled!

Pyste will be installed!

===>  Found saved configuration for boost-1.37.0_1
===>  Extracting for boost-python-1.37.0_1
=> MD5 Checksum OK for boost_1_37_0.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for boost_1_37_0.tar.bz2.
===>  Patching for boost-python-1.37.0_1
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for boost-python-1.37.0_1
===>   boost-python-1.37.0_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/python2.6 - found
===>   boost-python-1.37.0_1 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/python2.6/site-packages/elementtree/ElementTree.py - not found
===>    Verifying install for /usr/local/lib/python2.6/site-packages/elementtree/ElementTree.py in /usr/ports/devel/py-elementtree
===>  py26-elementtree-1.2.6_1 this comes with the Python package.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/py-elementtree.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/boost.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/boost.

Fix: 

# find /usr/local/lib/python2.6 -name ElementTree.py
/usr/local/lib/python2.6/xml/etree/ElementTree.py

# cp /usr/local/lib/python2.6/xml/etree/ElementTree.py /usr/local/lib/python2.6/site-packages/elementtree/ElementTree.py
How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/devel/boost && make -DWITH_PYTHON -DWITH_PYSTE
